description: Seed holds two documents; reader requests only the first document and ends with a stable partial store and correct accepted heads for the requested subset only

documents.notes: Requested document: reader will sync this one
Excluded document: reader must not receive objects for this document

notes: Proves M4 production replication sub-item 3: partial-doc selective sync (PROTOCOL §8).
Seed holds two documents with one extra revision each.
Reader requests only doc:partial-alpha; the resulting store must contain no objects for doc:partial-beta.
Reader accepted heads for doc:partial-alpha must match the seed's heads for that document.
